slices.label: Anomaly Wall
slices.description: High-priority campuses and unusual security, cloud, and parcelized conversion cases.

slices.label: Security Conversion
slices.description: Security-state reuse, federal training, policing, defense, and related controller paths.

slices.label: Cloud Infrastructure
slices.description: Cloud, data-center, research-campus, and technology-infrastructure conversion threads.

slices.label: Parcelized Real Estate
slices.description: Auction, liquidation, subdivided campus land, speculative ownership, and real-estate afterlives.

slices.label: Controller Webs
slices.description: Buyer/controller nodes and their connected campuses, transfers, and network edges.

slices.label: Evidence Gaps
slices.description: Missing coordinates, sources, afterlife status, morphology, verification, and buyer/controller fields.

slices.label: OPEID Systems
slices.description: Root-OPEID systems, branch clusters, and institutional retreat chains.
